org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared.filters

Packages that use org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared.filters
Package
Description
org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2
The jaxb2-maven-plugin wraps and adapts the JAXB reference implementation to be useful within the Maven build process.
org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.javageneration
The jaxb2-maven-plugin wraps and adapts the JAXB reference implementation to be useful within the Maven build process.
org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.schemageneration
The jaxb2-maven-plugin wraps and adapts the JAXB reference implementation to be useful within the Maven build process.
org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared
The jaxb2-maven-plugin wraps and adapts the JAXB reference implementation to be useful within the Maven build process.
org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared.filters

    Class
    Description
    Filter
    Generic Filter specification, whose implementations define if candidate objects should be accepted or not.

  • Classes in org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared.filters used by org.codehaus.mojo.jaxb2.shared.filters.pattern
    Class
    Description
    AbstractFilter
    Abstract Filter implementation which handles separating null candidate values from non-null ones, and delegates processing to concrete subclass implementations.
    Filter
    Generic Filter specification, whose implementations define if candidate objects should be accepted or not.
